title: Quantifying China’s NPL Market
dek: A framework for sizing and segmenting China’s non-performing-loan opportunity set.
keyFindings: NPL inventories remain heterogeneous across regions and lender types.
Resolution outcomes are driven by collateral quality, process speed, and local execution.
Specialist sourcing and restructuring capacity are key to realized returns.

paragraphs: This issue is presented in ShoreVest’s unified print format for consistency across the China Debt Dynamics archive.

disclaimer: This letter expresses the views of the author as of the date indicated and such views are subject to change without notice.
